ideation: This animation sequence depicts a guard standing at attention, then looking around, and finally returning to attention. The primary movement involves the arms; the head movement is implied. Frame 1 shows the guard at attention, arms straight down. Frame 2 shows the guard looking to the left, with the right arm slightly raised and angled toward the left. Frame 3 shows the guard looking to the right, with the left arm slightly raised and angled toward the right. Frame 4 returns the guard to attention, arms straight down.  The overall effect simulates alertness and attention to duty.

frames.beat: guard stands at attention, arms straight down
right arm lifts slightly, scanning to the left
left arm lifts slightly, scanning to the right
guard returns to attention, arms straight down
